description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of brick and white exterior finishes. The property is surrounded by a low stone wall and includes a landscaped yard with a swimming pool, palm trees, and a large leafy tree near the rear. The front facade has large windows and a small covered porch area, while the rear includes a patio and additional outdoor seating. A cylindrical water tank and a small outbuilding are visible within the property boundary. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others spaced apart. The overall appearance is contemporary and well-maintained, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with brick and white finishes, landscaped yard, pool, and large windows. Features include a porch, patio, and a mix of greenery.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat roof, pool, landscaped yard, and the arrangement of trees and outbuilding.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large windows, porch, and the brick facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, water tank, and the large tree near the back of the property.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the pool, palm tree, and the two-story structure with a mix of window sizes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
